fields.name: brand
fields.description: Brand name as provided in the input.

fields.name: engine
fields.description: Engine that produced this result (chatgpt, perplexity, gemini, claude).

fields.name: query
fields.description: The buyer-intent query that was sent to the engine.

fields.name: brand_mentioned
fields.description: Whether the brand appeared anywhere in the response.

fields.name: mention_count
fields.description: Number of times the brand (or an alias) appeared in the response.

fields.name: position_score
fields.description: 1–10: how early the brand was first mentioned. 10 = first, 1 = last, 0 = not mentioned.

fields.name: competitor_mentions
fields.description: Map of competitor name → mention count.

fields.name: cited_domains
fields.description: Deduplicated list of domains cited by the AI in this response.

fields.name: response_snippet
fields.description: First 400 characters of the AI's response.

fields.name: response_truncated
fields.description: True if the engine hit the token limit.
